table-206-206.caption: Show all paragraph texts for the document "Customer reviews".
data: "The camera quality is outstanding, capturing vivid details."
"My order arrived a day late, which was a minor inconvenience."
"The setup instructions were clear and easy to follow for a novice."
"While good, I feel the price point is a bit high for the features."
"Had an issue with connectivity, but support resolved it quickly."
"After a month of use, it still feels sturdy and well-built."
"Definitely recommend this product; it exceeded my expectations."
